source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A diffuser has air entering at 100 kPa and 300 K with a velocity of 200 m/s. The inlet cross-sectional area of the diffuser is 100 mm2. At the exit the area is 860 mm^2, and the exit velocity is 20 m/s. Determine the exit temperature of the air.
